project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: The working target is a repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud deployment flow that deploys Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW and boots directly to the `davis` desktop with no human interaction inside OOBE.

development.purpose: Active repository workspace for code, docs, tests, local commits, and setup validation.

host_management.purpose: Installed host-management bundle used by the deployment host after setup.

host_state.purpose: Mutable host-only state including local config, secrets, and staging after setup.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root selected in Web initialization; never located inside the Git clone.

development.summary: Setup now runs unattended after clone, defaults Web to 127.0.0.1:8080, auto-installs Node/npm plus OSD and OSDCloud host modules, and leaves ADK/WinPE/runtime work to Web Prepare runtime.

baseline.subject: fix: support optional trailing comments on server IP assignment in Start-OSDCloud-iPXE.ps1

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web project-root selection, Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
forbidden: Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit the Web-selected deployment project root.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
Do not write deployment runtime files back into the Git clone.

recent_changes.summary:
- Consolidated separate development workspace and deployment clone definitions into a single, path-independent workspace representing the active Git clone root.
- Removed all references to the obsolete C:\Users\davis\Documents\Codex\osdcloud-project directory.
- Updated AGENTS.md, GEMINI.md, TEST-LOOP.md, docs/agent-reference/repo-workflow.md, and .ai/status.json.
recent_changes.verification: Grep search confirmed no references to obsolete paths; JSON schema validated.

recent_changes.summary: - Fixed right-side action buttons being disabled in guided setup steps when the runtime was already prepared. The runtime.ready check is now scoped specifically to the 'prepare-runtime' step.

- Fixed regex pattern mismatch error during endpoint sync in Set-OsdCloudIpxeEndpoint.ps1.
- Updated Set-StartOsdCloudEndpoint to support optional trailing comments on the '$server =' line in Start-OSDCloud-iPXE.ps1.
recent_changes.verification: Powershell regex validation was successful and all 219 JavaScript tests pass.

recent_changes.summary:
- Redirected verbose stdout/stderr outputs from Prepare Runtime and Endpoint Sync processes to dedicated log files: C:\OSDCloud\logs\runtime-prepare.log and endpoint-sync.log.
- Wrote helper addOperationVerboseLog in serviceController.js to log raw syslog format to files and formatted output to Web UI.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.4.
- Added unit tests to verify dedicated logging files and syslog formatting.

- Consolidated host-side service logs (DHCP, TFTP, HTTP, WEB-OP) into a single RFC 5424 Syslog file: logs/host-services.log.
- Wrote client-side progress status logs to per-run syslog files: logs/runs/<runId>/deployment.log.
- Duplicated client-side screenshots under logs/runs/<runId>/screenshots/.
- Implemented local offset timezone formatters and integrated Syslog header parsing to ensure Web UI console log display remains backward-compatible and clean.
- Added new test cases verifying Syslog formatting, file writes, and screenshot duplication.
- Bumped package.json and package-lock.json version to 0.5.3.
